name: KeyLess
short_description: Keyless is a jump and run platformer, with very unique logic puzzles.By starting the game you get into a dispute between logicians and poets.As a result you lose access to the keys on your keyboard!You will have to think differently than usual to regain control!
detailed_description:
In Keyless, you embark on a thrilling journey where your PC-keyboard becomes both your greatest challenge and key to progress.

As you navigate through this jump-and-run puzzle adventure, you need to regain control over your keyboard, to move forward, tackling logic puzzles along the way. Prepare to challenge your mind with innovative, never-before-seen puzzles that will push the boundaries of logic and creativity.

Navigate seamlessly between 2D and 3D movement mechanics, adding depth and complexity to your journey.

However, your journey is not just about solving puzzles — it is a deep dive into the ongoing conflict between poets and logicians.

As you uncover the roots of their dispute, you will be able to decipher the strange scheme that led to your scrambled keyboard.

This battle of intellect and creativity pulls you in, making you an integral part of the struggle.

Immerse yourself in a world where beautifully composed music sets the tone for an extraordinary adventure.

Experience stunning low-poly visuals that bring the poets' realms to life, contrasting sharply with the rigorous architectural design of the logicians' areas.

Throughout your adventure, you will stumble upon mathematical oddities crafted by the logicians, challenging your perception of logic and reason.

Simultaneously, you will discover famous poetic quotes, offering a different perspective and enriching your understanding of this unique world.

Keyless is not just a game; it is an intellectual and artistic journey, urging you to think outside the box, question conventions, and ultimately, reclaim control — one key at a time.
